title: Farming - Hypixel SkyBlock Gadget
description: Enable attack toggle when holding farming tools and allow controller(joystick) to move around and break crops.
body:
### Note
This mod requires [hsglib](https://modrinth.com/mod/hsglib). Mod Menu and YetAnotherConfigLib(YACL) are also required to open the 3 config screens.
### Attack Toggle
Enable the vanilla attack toggle option when you are holding farming tools. Only the 12 specific tools work. There is also a label when attack toggled.
### Controller(Joystick) Control
Use your first controller to move around, break crops and open inventory to pause move and break. Make sure to set the keybind mapping first.
### Farm Boundary Notification
A number count down will appear when you are near the farm boundary to remind you to switch farming direction. Make sure to set the 2 block position to mark them as farm boundary first.
